cta_banner.title: Ready to Find Your Perfect Piano?
cta_banner.subtitle: Visit our workshop in Jerusalem or get in touch — we'd love to help you find the instrument that speaks to you.

about.hero_subtitle: We believe every piano deserves to be heard at its finest.
about.story_body1: Trio Piano Workshop was founded with a single mission: to give pianos the care and craftsmanship they deserve. Located in the heart of Jerusalem, our workshop brings together master technicians, restorers, and passionate musicians.
about.story_body2: We specialize in restoring vintage and modern pianos to concert-level performance, and we import select instruments from Japan — a country renowned for producing some of the world's finest pianos.
about.story_body3: Whether you're searching for your first piano or looking to restore a family heirloom, we are here to guide you every step of the way.
about.value1_desc: Every piano we touch receives our full attention. We use only the best materials and techniques.
about.value2_desc: We give honest assessments and fair prices. Your trust is the foundation of everything we do.
about.value3_desc: We are musicians and craftspeople first. The love of the piano drives every decision we make.

services.hero_subtitle: From restoration to sales, we cover every aspect of the piano journey.
services.restoration_body: Our restoration service is the heart of what we do. We assess each piano individually and create a tailored restoration plan — addressing everything from soundboard repairs and string replacement to action rebuilds, refinishing, and voicing. The result: an instrument that plays and sounds like new.
restoration_list: Tuning and voicing to concert standard
services.sales_body: Our showroom features a hand-picked selection of pianos at every price point — from fully restored vintage uprights to pristine Japanese grands. Each piano is thoroughly inspected, regulated, and tuned before being offered for sale.
services.import_subtitle: The Best of Japan, Delivered to Jerusalem
services.import_body: Japan produces some of the world's most reliable and expressive pianos. We have established direct relationships with dealers and auction houses in Japan, allowing us to source exceptional instruments at competitive prices. Brands we work with include Yamaha, Kawai, and other Japanese manufacturers.
services.cta_title: Have a Question About a Service?
services.cta_body: We're happy to advise. Every situation is unique and we'll always give you an honest recommendation.

store.hero_subtitle: Each instrument has been personally selected, inspected, and prepared by our team.
store.empty: No pianos match your filter. Try a different category.

gallery.hero_subtitle: See the transformation. Every piano tells a story of renewal.

contact.hero_title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.hero_subtitle: Whether you have a piano that needs restoration, are looking to buy, or just have a question — we're here.
contact.form_success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or call us directly.
